G

getAllCounselors(CounselorRepository.OnCounselorsLoadedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository
Fetches all counselor documents from Firestore.
getAppointmentId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackService
 
getAppointmentsForCounselor(String, AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository
Fetches all appointments for a given counselor, ordered by date ascending.
getAppointmentsForStudent(String, AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository
Fetches all appointments for a given student, ordered by date ascending.
getAppointmentsForStudentOnDate(String, String, AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository
Fetches appointments for a student on a specific date.
getAvailableSlotsForCounselor(String, AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotsLoadedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilityRepository
Fetches only available slots for a given counselor.
getBio() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Returns the counselor's biography shown on their profile screen.
getComment() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackService
 
getCompletedAppointmentsNeedingFeedback(String, AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository
Fetches completed appointments for a student that don't yet have feedback submitted.
getCounselor(String, CounselorRepository.OnCounselorFetchedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository
Fetches a single counselor by their Firestore document ID.
getCounselorId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Appointment
 
getCounselorId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilitySchedule
Returns the counselor UID this schedule belongs to.
getCounselorId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.TimeSlot
 
getCounselors() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SessionCache
Returns the cached counselor list if still fresh, or null if expired/absent.
getCreatedAt() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Student
Returns the timestamp when this account was created.
getCurrentUser(UserRepository.OnUserFetchedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository
Fetches the Firestore document for the currently authenticated user and deserializes it into a Student object.
getCurrentUserRole(UserRepository.OnRoleFetchedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository
Resolves the role of the currently authenticated user by checking both Firestore collections: users/{uid} — students and admins; role is stored in the role field. counselors/{uid} — counselors provisioned directly in this collection (no role field required; presence in the collection implies counselor role).
getDate() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Appointment
 
getDate() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.TimeSlot
 
getDatesWithAvailability() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilitySchedule
Returns the set of dates that have at least one available slot.
getEmail() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Student
Returns the student's university email address.
getGender() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Returns the counselor's gender as displayed on their profile.
getId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Appointment
 
getId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Returns the Firestore document ID for this counselor.
getId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackService
 
getId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.TimeSlot
 
getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SessionCache
Returns the singleton instance.
getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentAdapter
 
getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorAdapter
 
getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.StudentAppointmentAdapter
 
getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.TimeSlotAdapter
 
getLanguage() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Returns the counselor's spoken language preference.
getName() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Returns the counselor's display name.
getName() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Student
Returns the student's full legal name.
getOnLeave() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Returns whether this counselor is currently on leave.
getOnLeaveMessage() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Returns the custom message displayed when the counselor is on leave.
getPreferredName() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Student
Returns the student's preferred name (what they want to be called).
getPronouns() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Student
Returns the student's pronoun preference.
getRating() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackService
 
getReferralCounselorId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Returns the Firestore document ID of the colleague counselor this counselor refers students to during leave (US-19).
getRole() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Student
Returns the user's role string, always STUDENT for this class.
getSingleCounselor(String) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SessionCache
Returns the cached single counselor if still fresh and matching the ID.
getSlotId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Appointment
 
getSlotsForCounselor(String, AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotsLoadedCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilityRepository
Fetches all time slots (available and unavailable) for a given counselor.
getSlotsForDate(String) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilitySchedule
Returns all available slots for a specific date.
getSpecializations() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Returns the list of specialization tags for this counselor.
getStatus() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Appointment
 
getStudent(String) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SessionCache
Returns the cached student if still fresh, or null if expired/absent.
getStudentAppointments(String) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SessionCache
Returns the cached appointment list if still fresh and for the same student, or null if expired/absent/wrong student.
getStudentId() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Appointment
 
getSubmittedAt() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackService
 
getTheme() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.BookingConfirmationFragment
Forces the light pastel bottom sheet theme instead of the app's DayNight theme.
getTime() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Appointment
 
getTime() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.TimeSlot
 
getUid() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
Returns the Firebase Auth UID linked to this counselor's user account.
getUid() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.Student
Returns the Firebase Auth UID, which also serves as the Firestore document ID.
getUserName(String, UserRepository.OnUserNameCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository
Fetches only the name field for a given user UID.
GRIEF - Static variable in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SpecializationTags
Grief counseling specialization.
